title: Border Game
description: Plugin created for border expansion servers.
body:
This is a plugin created for border expanding servers, like "The border expands 1 block per day".

You can make purchasable border sizes with CommandPanels, or similar plugins.

The plugin contains 3 main commands:

- /bordergame reset [size] | Changes border size to a specific size
- /bordergame add [size] | This adds size to the current border size
- /bordergame center | This centers the border to 0;0

Update Status:
- For more features, dm me on discord, my name is: maestro7576
